analysis:
【今日摘要】
今日市場情緒呈現出來的是對於人工智慧和記憶體晶片的投資熱潮。小型股ETF表現出色，標普500指數的最大七家公司（Mag 7）今年表現不佳，為小型股ETF提供了機會。Micron和SanDisk因Nasdaq重奪關鍵支撐而大幅上漲，但是否可作為買賣依據？Delta、台積電、SK Hynix的表現值得關注。另外，OpenAI執行長Fidji Simo因為慢性疾病辭職，將轉任顧問。美聯儲新任務小組成員對人工智慧持正面態度，表明美聯儲正逐步採用人工智慧技術。

【結語】
投資者們應該保持謹慎和耐心。人工智慧和記憶體晶片的投資熱潮可能會持續一段時間，但也可能會出現波動。投資者們應該評估公司的基本面和財務狀況，避免被市場情緒所左右。另外，投資者們也應該注意到市場的風險，包括投資熱潮的破裂和公司的財務問題。

【精選個股】
ATZ:CA - Aritzia Inc. - 公司的財務表現和技術指標均有進一步改善，表明公司的財務狀況正在穩步好轉。
WIX - Wix.com - 公司與Elavon合作推出統一商業解決方案，重新引起投資者關注。
RAX - Rackspace - 因為與人工智慧相關的夥伴關係而扭轉了其成長趨勢，投資者是否該買跌？
風險提醒：投資者們應該注意到市場的風險，包括投資熱潮的破裂和公司的財務問題。

items.title: Small Cap ETFs Are Beating the S 500 as the Mag 7 Stumble
items.summary: A rough year for most of the megacaps has opened the door for funds that tilt away from the biggest stocks.
items.zh_title: 小型股ETF超越標普500指數　Mag 7出現滑坡
items.zh_point: 小型股ETF在大型股出現滑坡的情況下表現出色，標普500指數的最大七家公司（Mag 7）今年表現不佳，為小型股ETF提供了機會。

items.title: Dow Jones Futures: Micron, Sandisk Jump As Nasdaq Tops Key Level; Delta, Taiwan Semi, SK Hynix Due
items.summary: Micron and Sandisk soared as the Nasdaq reclaimed key support, but are they actionable? Delta, Taiwan Semi, SK Hynix loom.
items.zh_title: 道瓊指數未來：Micron、SanDisk跳升 Nasdaq重奪關鍵水平；Delta、台積電、SK Hynix待命
items.zh_point: Micron和SanDisk因Nasdaq重奪關鍵支撐而大幅上漲，但是否可作為買賣依據？Delta、台積電、SK Hynix的表現值得關注。

items.title: Why ServiceNow Stock Crushed it on Thursday
items.summary: A large international electronics company is teaming up with it for a new product.
items.zh_title: 為什麼ServiceNow股價大幅上漲
items.zh_point: ServiceNow與一家全球知名電子公司合作開發新產品，股價因此大幅上漲。

items.title: Is XRP Priced Too High for What It Actually Delivers?
items.summary: XRP has more growth catalysts than before, but investors should still assess how much the XRP Ledger network is actually being used.
items.zh_title: XRP 價格是否已經過高？
items.zh_point: XRP 有更多的成長驅動力，但投資者仍應該評估 XRP Ledger 網路實際上被使用的程度。

items.title: Wix.com (WIX) Could Be 37% Undervalued On Elavon Partnership News
items.summary: Wix.com (WIX) stock is back in focus after the company announced a partnership with Elavon to power unified commerce solutions that link payments, online stores, and in person sales for small businesses. See our latest analysis for Wix.com. Despite the Elavon and Microsoft 365 Copilot partnerships putting Wix.com back on investors’ radar, the 90 day share price return is down 24.4% and the year to date share price return is down 51.23%, while the 1 year total shareholder return is down...
items.zh_title: Wix.com (WIX) 可能被低估 37% 因 Elavon 合作消息
items.zh_point: Wix.com (WIX) 股票因與 Elavon 合作推出統一商業解決方案，重新引起投資者關注。儘管與 Elavon 和 Microsoft 365 Copilot 合作消息使 Wix.com 重回投資者視線，但近 90 天股價回報下跌 24.4%，今年頭股價回報下跌 51.23%，一年內股東回報率下跌...

items.title: OpenAI exec Fidji Simo says she's stepping down due to chronic illness, will transition to advisor
items.summary: Fidji Simo stepped away from OpenAI in April for a medical leave, says she now has to focus on recovery.
items.zh_title: OpenAI 執行長 Fidji Simo 表示因為慢性疾病而辭職，將轉任顧問
items.zh_point: OpenAI 執行長 Fidji Simo 因為慢性疾病而辭職，將轉任顧問，並於四月份因為健康理由離開公司。

items.title: Friday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
items.summary: Cooling oil prices and rising chip stocks lifted the major averages to a winning session on Thursday. The Nasdaq Composite gained 1.3%.
items.zh_title: 週五的大宗股票新聞：明天交易會影響市場的什麼？
items.zh_point: 石油價格下跌和晶片股上漲，週四讓大盤大幅上漲，納斯達克指數上漲1.3%。

items.title: Inside NATO's extraordinary 48 hours that revealed Trump's grip on global diplomacy
items.summary: Steve Sedgwick goes behind the scenes of NATO's dramatic 48 hours, where Trump's changing tone reshaped diplomacy and left allies guessing.
items.zh_title: 納托48小時內幕：川普掌控全球外交的驚人變化
items.zh_point: 川普在納托峰會期間的態度改變，讓全球外交局勢出現重大變化，盟國們對此感到困惑。

items.title: New Fed task force members share Chairman Kevin Warsh's embrace of AI
items.summary: The three members of a task force advising the Fed on artificial intelligence are strong proponents of the technology.
items.zh_title: 美聯儲新任任務小組成員擁抱人工智慧
items.zh_point: 美聯儲任務小組新成員對人工智慧持正面態度，表明美聯儲正逐步採用人工智慧技術。

items.title: Where Jim Cramer stands on SK Hynix's massive offering
items.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer said SK Hynix looks remarkably cheap, but warned that buying it is a bet that the AI-driven memory boom won't end like previous cycles.
items.zh_title: 克拉默對SK Hynix大規模發行的看法
items.zh_point: 克拉默認為SK Hynix的股價相當便宜，但他警告買入這家公司是一個賭注，賭注的是人工智慧驅動的記憶體市場不會像之前的周期一樣結束。

items.title: Taco Bell is reportedly pulling produce from some stores. Here’s what to know.
items.summary: An outbreak of a parasite-caused illness has sickened more than 1,000 people in Michigan.
items.zh_title: 塔可貝爾可能從某些店面撤走生果
items.zh_point: 據報導，密西根州一場由寄生蟲引起的疾病爆發，已經感染超過1,000人。

items.title: Why a hidden divergence between the VIX and Nasdaq volatility has the smart money on edge
items.summary: Traders are completely enthralled by the bull market — but surging Nasdaq volatility suggests it is time to hedge.
items.zh_title: 為什麼VIX與納斯達克波動率之間的隱藏分歧讓聰明的投資者感到緊張
items.zh_point: 投資者們對牛市充滿熱情，但納斯達克波動率的急劇上升，可能是時候開始進行對沖了。

items.title: SK Hynix is about to hit the U.S. market. Here’s what to know about the deal.

items.title: ‘I’ve no idea how they got her number’: My student-loan servicer called a friend after I missed a payment. Is that legal?
items.summary: “She said it’s the second message they have left.”
items.zh_title: 貸款服務商打電話給朋友：我錯過付款後該怎麼辦？
items.zh_point: 貸款服務商打電話給朋友，是否違法？貸款服務商稱為了追蹤欠款，打了多個電話，包括打給朋友。這種做法是否合理？

items.title: Can Walmart help the Fed harness real-time U.S. economic data? We’re about to find out.
items.summary: The Federal Reserve named a former Walmart CEO to a task force to develop contemporaneous data on spending, inflation and growth.
items.zh_title: 沃爾瑪能否幫助美聯儲掌握實時經濟數據？
items.zh_point: 美聯儲成立了一個任務小組，包括前沃爾瑪董事長，目的是發展能夠即時追蹤消費、通膨和經濟成長的數據。

items.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
items.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
items.zh_title: AI產業大幅下挫 美股市場全面下跌
items.zh_point: 美國股市大幅下跌，主要由於AI基礎設施製造商大幅下跌，納斯達克指數領跌。Nvidia股價下跌16%。

items.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
items.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
items.zh_title: 紐約黃金交易所金、銀價格下跌
items.zh_point: 紐約黃金交易所的黃金價格下跌1.4%，連續兩天下跌；白銀價格下跌2.5%，連續三天下跌。

items.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
items.summary: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.
items.zh_title: 中國DeepSeek AI的關鍵知識
items.zh_point: 中國新興企業宣稱已經訓練出高表現的AI模型，且成本低廉，且不需要使用最先進的晶片。

items.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
items.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
items.zh_title: 深度探索不會淹沒美國AI巨頭
items.zh_point: 對於Nvidia、Broadcom等科技巨頭的股價下跌，恐慌情緒可能過度膨脹。

items.title: US House to vote on bill to make daylight saving time permanent
